description: Conversational finance Q&A with sandboxed synthetic tools. Not live ERP/bank access.
sample_user_messages: What is the current meal expense policy action?
Which GL account should I use for travel meals?
Reconcile the open book entry to the bank deposit.
notes: Do not wire into active DemoStage until inference/API review.
Scoring uses finance_agent.metrics.v1, not finance-proof.v1 primary index.
